label: Supports large language models only; vision-language models (VLMs), diffusion models, and other non-LLM architectures are not yet supported.
Produces prefill-only models; decode-path (KV cache, incremental generation) is handled separately.
Requires HuggingFace access; this skill may fail behind restrictive firewalls or if the model repository is gated/private without a valid HF token.
